site.name: Partner Market Global
site.description: Partner Market Global is a curated B2B showcase for import, export, distribution, licensing, private label and franchise opportunities from ambitious companies looking for qualified international partners.

hero.headline: Curated global business opportunities, ready for the right market partner.
hero.subheadline: Explore verified import, export, distribution, franchise and licensing opportunities from ambitious companies looking to expand internationally.

trust.title: Curated. Structured. Easier to trust.
trust.subtitle: We verify and structure every opportunity so you can evaluate it with confidence and connect with the right partner faster.
trust.opportunityAssessmentDesc: Market potential and partner profile assessed
trust.secureInquiriesDesc: Qualified inquiries only via secure platform

cta.headline: Have a product, service, brand or franchise ready for new markets?
cta.subheadline: Showcase your opportunity to qualified international partners.

opportunities.title: Browse curated business opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: Explore verified import, export, distribution, master franchise, licensing and private label opportunities from businesses ready to enter new markets.

opportunityDetail.secureBox:
♡ 100% Secure & Confidential
We respect your privacy.
whyPartnerList: Proven products with strong consumer demand

hero.headline: Showcase your business opportunity to qualified international partners.
hero.subheadline: We help you reach importers, distributors, franchisees, operators and investors looking for the right opportunities.

whoCanList.title: Who Can List?
whoCanList.subtitle: We welcome a wide range of business opportunities.

steps.reviewDesc: We review and verify your business and documents.
steps.profileDesc: We build your premium opportunity profile.
steps.goLiveDesc: Your opportunity goes live on our platform.

hero.headline: Commercial terms are on inquiry and 100% commission based
hero.subheadline: Partner Market Global does not publish fixed listing packages or monthly pricing. Commission scope, trigger, territory and timing are agreed in writing before work starts.

packages.title: Commercial Terms On Inquiry
packages.subtitle: Partner Market Global works on a 100% commission-based model. The exact commission, scope and trigger are agreed in writing before representation starts.
packages.legalNote: Commercial terms are provided on inquiry. Commission applies only under a written agreement that defines scope, territory, trigger, timing and any exclusions. We do not provide legal, financial or investment advice.

success: Scope and trigger defined in writing

importantNotes.title: Important Notes
importantNotes.note1: Partner Market Global provides marketing, curation and lead-generation services on a commission-based inquiry model. We do not provide legal, financial, investment, franchise, tax or securities advice.
importantNotes.note2: Any commission percentage, payment trigger, territory, exclusions and timing must be agreed in a clear written agreement before representation or partner-search work starts.

hero.headline: Structured opportunity profiles that are easier to evaluate
hero.subheadline: We combine business review, document organization and clear partner requirements so serious inquiries can move faster.

curation.disclaimerText: Our review improves presentation quality and helps filter obvious spam or incomplete opportunities. It is not a guarantee of performance, profitability, legal compliance or commercial success. Interested parties must complete their own due diligence.

about.headline: Connecting brands, businesses and opportunities with the right partners around the world.
about.body1: Partner Market Global is designed for companies that want a better way to present international opportunities than a generic directory or cold outreach campaign.
about.body2: We structure each opportunity into a clear, investor-deck-quality profile covering partner requirements, market scope, commercial model, credentials, available documents and the next step for interested parties.
focusList: Licensing, brand partnerships and private label / OEM opportunities

hero.headline: Talk to us about your international opportunity
hero.subheadline: Email us or use the inquiry form below.

inquiry.title: Send a Qualified Inquiry
inquiry.subtitle: Tell us about your business and we will connect you with the right person.

fields.reason: Why are you interested in this opportunity?
fields.requirements: Can you meet the minimum requirements?

inquiry.consent: I confirm that I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and consent to sharing my inquiry with the opportunity owner.
inquiry.privacyNote: We respect your privacy. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Partner Market Global is operated by Alex de Vries of De Vries Sales Consultancy. We collect information submitted through inquiry, contact and listing forms so we can review opportunities, respond to inquiries and, where consent is given or needed to provide the requested service, share qualified inquiries with the relevant opportunity owner.
infoList: Name, company, email, phone or WhatsApp number and country
Company website, business activity and partner profile
Opportunity details and documents submitted for review
Technical analytics data such as pages viewed and approximate region
privacy.howText: We use information to operate the platform, evaluate listing applications, qualify inquiries, prevent spam and abuse, improve the website, maintain business records and communicate with users.
privacy.sharingText: We share qualified inquiry details with the relevant opportunity owner or client when the user has consented or when necessary to provide the requested service. We may also use trusted service providers for hosting, security, analytics and business operations. We do not sell personal data.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Partner Market Global is a curated business opportunity showcase. By using this website, you agree that listings are provided for information and business introduction purposes only.
terms.disclaimerText: We do not guarantee commercial success, profitability, financing, market entry approval, legal compliance or partner performance. We do not provide legal, financial, investment, franchise, tax or securities advice. Users must conduct their own due diligence.
terms.listingsText: We may reject, edit, suspend or remove listings that are incomplete, misleading, outdated or unsuitable for the platform.
terms.inquiriesText: Submitting an inquiry does not create a partnership, franchise agreement, distribution agreement or investment relationship.
terms.contactText: Questions about these terms can be sent to

footer.tagline: Connecting brands, businesses and opportunities with the right partners around the world.
footer.brandBy: Operated by Alex de Vries of De Vries Sales Consultancy.

whatIs.question: What is Partner Market Global?
whatIs.answer: Partner Market Global is a curated B2B showcase for import, export, distribution, licensing, private label and franchise opportunities.

canList.question: Can companies list franchise or distribution opportunities?
canList.answer: Yes. Companies can apply to list product, service, franchise, licensing, private label and country partner opportunities after review and curation.

guarantee.question: Does Partner Market Global guarantee commercial success?
guarantee.answer: No. Partner Market Global provides a curated showcase platform but does not guarantee commercial success, profitability or partner performance. All interested parties should conduct their own due diligence.

howInquire.question: How do I inquire about an opportunity?
howInquire.answer: Click any View Details button on an opportunity card, review the full profile, and submit a qualified inquiry through the secure inquiry form on the opportunity detail page.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about how Partner Market Global works for companies and international partners.

submitOpportunity.title: Submit a Business Opportunity
submitOpportunity.metaTitle: Submit a Business Opportunity | Partner Market Global
submitOpportunity.metaDescription: Submit your product, service, distribution, investment or partnership opportunity to Partner Market Global for review.
submitOpportunity.introBody: Do you represent a company looking for distributors, importers, retailers, investors, licensees, franchise partners, customers or strategic partners? Tell us briefly about the opportunity and upload any relevant pictures or documents. Partner Market Global will review the submission and contact you if we need further information.
submitOpportunity.confidentialNote: Please do not submit confidential information that you are not authorised to share.

success.title: Thank You for Your Submission
success.subtitle: Your opportunity has been sent to Partner Market Global for review. We will contact you if we require additional information.
